description: Task instructions are being typed out on the Askable Sessions page: 'As you keep exploring the prototype, what else are you finding that helps you decide which opportunities to click on?'
frame_description: Dark background with centered text being typed out character by character.

description: User clicks on the 'Smart Filters Mobile App' browser tab to switch to the Figma prototype.
frame_description: Browser interface showing tabs at the top; cursor is clicking the second tab.

description: Page navigates from the instructions page to the Figma prototype.
frame_description: Screen transitions from the dark instruction page to the Figma prototype interface.

description: User scrolls down the list of research opportunities in the prototype.
frame_description: Mobile app prototype showing a vertical list of opportunity cards scrolling downwards.

description: User hovers the cursor over the 'AI Interview' opportunity card.
frame_description: Cursor lingers over a pink card labeled 'AI Interview' in the opportunity list.

description: User scrolls back up the opportunity list.
frame_description: The list of opportunity cards scrolls upwards.

description: User hovers over the 'Video Call' opportunity card.
frame_description: Cursor pauses over the 'Video Call' card at the top of the list.

description: User clicks on the 'Askable Sessions' browser tab to return to the instructions.
frame_description: Cursor clicks the first browser tab.

description: Page navigates back to the instructions page.
frame_description: Screen transitions back to the dark instruction page.

description: New task instructions are typed out: 'What does seeing that information about the device—like mobile or desktop—mean for you in this lunch break scenario?'
frame_description: Dark background with new instruction text appearing character by character.

description: User clicks on the 'Smart Filters Mobile App' browser tab.
frame_description: Cursor clicks the second browser tab.

description: Page navigates back to the Figma prototype.
frame_description: Screen transitions to the mobile app prototype.

description: User scrolls down the list of opportunities.
frame_description: Opportunity cards scrolling downwards.

description: User scrolls back up the list.
frame_description: Opportunity cards scrolling upwards.

description: User hovers over the 'Video Call' opportunity card.
frame_description: Cursor pauses over the top card in the list.

description: User scrolls up slightly to reach the top of the list.
frame_description: List header becomes fully visible.

description: User hovers over the 'Diary Study' opportunity card.
frame_description: Cursor lingers over an orange card labeled 'Diary Study'.

description: User scrolls to the very top of the page.
frame_description: Header 'Explore' and 'Sessions to schedule' are visible at the top.

description: User clicks on the filter icon in the top right of the app header.
frame_description: Cursor clicks the funnel icon in the top right corner of the mobile frame.

description: The 'Filter Opportunities' menu slides up from the bottom.
frame_description: A white modal overlay appears over the opportunity list.

description: User hovers over the 'Mobile Only' option in the Device section of the filter menu.
frame_description: Cursor lingers over the 'Mobile Only' radio button option.

description: User selects the 'Mobile Only' radio button.
frame_description: Cursor clicks the radio button for 'Mobile Only'.

description: The UI updates to show the 'Mobile Only' option is selected.
frame_description: The radio button fills with blue to indicate selection.

description: User hovers over the 'Apply Filters' button at the bottom of the menu.
frame_description: Cursor moves to the blue 'Apply Filters' button at the bottom of the modal.

description: User clicks the 'Apply Filters' button.
frame_description: Cursor clicks the blue button.

description: The filter menu closes and the opportunity list updates to show only mobile opportunities.
frame_description: The filter modal disappears and the list content refreshes with a 'Mobile Only' tag visible.

description: User clicks on the 'Askable Sessions' browser tab.
frame_description: Cursor clicks the first browser tab.

description: Page navigates back to the instructions page.
frame_description: Screen transitions back to the dark instruction page.

description: Final task instructions are typed out: 'Go ahead and try that out if you'd like—what are you noticing as you interact with...'
frame_description: Dark background with final instruction text appearing.
